_comment: Production-shape workflow: SCCM package create -> distribute to all DPs -> set security scopes, then AD group provisioning (two groups with nesting), with phase-boundary logs and success/failure email reporting. Every failing step routes through a shared log-failure node before the failure email so the incident is persisted in the Serilog rolling file even if SMTP is down. SCCM distribution has a retry policy for transient network issues. PowerShell uses real ConfigMgr/ActiveDirectory cmdlets with an automatic simulation fallback when the modules aren't installed, so the same definition runs in prod AND on a dev box without modification. Layout follows the LTR Showcase Styleguide (x-step 340, y-lane 200, main lane y=400, success branch above, failure branch below).

config.message: Deployment started | package='{{trigger.param.packageName}} {{trigger.param.packageVersion}}' | site={{trigger.param.sccmSiteCode}}@{{trigger.param.sccmSiteServer}} | scope={{trigger.param.securityScope}} | adOU={{trigger.param.adOU}} | groups={{trigger.param.adGroup1Name}} <- {{trigger.param.adGroup2Name}}
SCCM phase complete | packageId={{pkg.param.packageId}} | dps={{dist.param.dpCount}} ({{dist.param.dpSummary}}) | scope={{scope.param.scopeApplied}} | mode={{pkg.param.mode}}

data.label: AD: Nest Child into Parent Group

config.message: AD phase complete | parent={{grp1.param.group1Dn}} | child={{grp2.param.group2Dn}} | nesting={{nest.param.action}} ({{nest.param.nestMembership}}) | mode={{grp1.param.mode}}

config.subject: [OK] Deployment '{{trigger.param.packageName}}' completed

config.message: Deployment FAILED | package='{{trigger.param.packageName}} {{trigger.param.packageVersion}}' | site={{trigger.param.sccmSiteCode}} | parent={{trigger.param.adGroup1Name}} | child={{trigger.param.adGroup2Name}} | see StepExecution rows for failing-step ErrorOutput (root cause)

config.subject: [FAIL] Deployment '{{trigger.param.packageName}}' aborted
